name: Blue Ridge Geotechnical Engineers
description: Full-service geotechnical firm specializing in slope stability analysis, foundation design, and landslide mitigation for Western North Carolina. Over 25 years of experience in mountain terrain.

name: Appalachian Geological Consultants
description: Geological hazard assessments, terrain mapping, and subsurface investigations. Specializing in debris flow risk evaluation and post-storm damage assessment.

name: Mountain Slope Solutions
description: Design and construction of slope stabilization systems including soil nails, retaining walls, and drainage solutions for residential and commercial properties.

name: Pisgah Environmental & Geotechnical
description: Combined environmental and geotechnical services including Phase I/II assessments, stormwater management, and slope stability analysis for development projects.

name: WNC Soil & Foundation Engineers
description: Soil borings, percolation testing, and foundation engineering for mountain building sites. Expertise in colluvial soils and weathered bedrock common to the region.

name: Buncombe Land Surveyors
description: Boundary surveys, topographic mapping, and ALTA surveys. High-resolution terrain analysis using LiDAR and drone photogrammetry for slope assessment.

name: Craggy Mountain Engineering Group
description: Civil engineering and site development with deep expertise in mountain grading, erosion control, and stormwater management for steep terrain construction.
